title: ScanSupplementsInput
description: Input contract for the scan-supplements orchestration: extract markers and findings from atlas supplementary material.

resolved_names.description: Resolved names from the resolve-name step — used to broaden the search.

pmcid.description: PubMed Central ID of the atlas paper.

supplementary_text.description: Already-fetched supplementary material text. May be empty if unavailable.

traversal_dir.description: Directory path where supplementary_findings.json will be written.
